## I need your vote tonight!
Now that the show has begun, the voting is open. My dance will be at the top of the second hour, but you can start casting votes now!
---
| | **_How to vote:_**

Voting is now open! You have to cast all your votes before the end of the last dance!

You can submit 20 votes total for Sean and Lindsay.

You can submit 10 votes by texting SEAN to 21523. Each text is one vote, you have to send SEAN 10 times to submit all 10 votes.

You can submit 10 additional votes online at [ABC.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=338097c7b1&e=f6564bbe3b). You need to start by making an account [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b9c5f6bce6&e=f6564bbe3b) (which you can do now before voting opens). When voting begins you login and can add 10 votes for Sean and Lindsay, #TeamSweetandSpicey.

All the information on making an ABC account and other FAQs are [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3a6b0ecdff&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| PS- today is my birthday and all I'm asking for this year is your votes.

Thanks for your support and all the votes,

_Sean_

name: Eric Hyers, Campaign Manager
subject: 4 more hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
After Matt Bevin and his allies began airing false ads viciously attacking Andy Beshear, we launched a 24 Hour Rapid Response Fund to make sure we have the resources to fight back.
|
---

| | Peter,

After Matt Bevin and his allies began airing false ads viciously attacking Andy Beshear, we launched a 24 Hour Rapid Response Fund to make sure we have the resources to fight back.

Since then, the response has been strong. Kentuckians across the commonwealth are stepping up and chipping in.

But we have 4 hours left and we still need to raise $1,497. We need to show Matt Bevin that there are consequences to running such a dishonest and disgraceful campaign. Hitting this goal will do that. **Please chip in right now.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a6c/ad6dc73/14193a8b/db797ec/4045884508/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-rapidresponse?express_lane=true&refcode=20190923.2nd__280__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a6c/ad6dc73/14193a8b/db797ed/4045884508/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-rapidresponse?express_lane=true&refcode=20190923.2nd__280__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a6c/ad6dc73/14193a8b/db797e2/4045884508/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-rapidresponse?express_lane=true&refcode=20190923.2nd__280__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a6c/ad6dc73/14193a8b/db797e3/4045884508/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-rapidresponse?express_lane=true&refcode=20190923.2nd__280__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a6c/ad6dc73/14193a8b/db797e0/4045884508/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-rapidresponse?express_lane=true&refcode=20190923.2nd__280__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a6c/ad6dc73/14193a8b/db797e1/4045884508/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-rapidresponse?refcode=20190923.2nd__280__")** Thanks,

name: Carly Reilly
subject: No one is going to give this to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but as the Finance Director it’s my job to report on the numbers.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=649%2E377263%2ES1AL-X) **We’re behind on our end-of-quarter fundraising goal! Can you chip in now to get us on track?** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10854?t=5&akid=649%2E377263%2ES1AL-X)
---
Friend --

I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but as the Finance Director, it’s my job to report on the numbers. And the unfortunate truth is -- the numbers aren’t good.

If we don’t catch up in the next 7 days, we won’t be able to make critical investments in Iowa and New Hampshire.

**Can you help by donating what you can afford to give so we can build a campaign that can win?**
[chip in now](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10854?t=7&akid=649%2E377263%2ES1AL-X)
---

While we are proud of the fact that over 80% of our fundraising comes from grassroots donors, this leaves us behind other candidates who have huge lists and are collecting checks in the thousands of dollars. **They will outraise us if you don’t step up.**

[ **Make a contribution now so we can close our fundraising gap before our critical FEC deadline.** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10854?t=6&akid=649%2E377263%2ES1AL-X)

We can’t let up now -- it’s crunch time.
-Carly Reilly

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=649%2E377263%2ES1AL-X) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=649%2E377263%2ES1AL-X) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
[Privacy Policy](https://www.yang2020.com/privacy_policy?t=4&akid=649%2E377263%2ES1AL-X)

name: Team Braun
subject: Important Update from Sen. Mike Braun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-y/)
---
| |
# [**President Trump's conservative
legacy is under attack. **](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-j/)
Peter, As the House continues its witch hunt at the American taxpayer’s expense, the Senate has been busy working to ensure conservative values will be protected by the courts for generations to come. Under President Trump, more conservative judges have been appointed to federal courts than any other time in history! **150 Judicial nominees confirmed since President Trump took office.** Protecting the courts is so important to advance our conservative values for a generation. We have accomplished a lot, **[but still have a long way to go.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-t/)** **That’s why I wanted to ask for your help.** We have an important upcoming FEC deadline on Sept. 30th. [**Could you pitch in any amount to help us reach our goal?**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-i/)
#
[Donate $5 ](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-d/) [Donate $10](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-h/) [Donate $25](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-k/) [Donate $50](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-u/) [Donate $100](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-b/) The 2020 election will be a defining election for Republicans across the country. We need to out-raise, out-work, and out-perform democrats in every state to show that we stand behind President Trump. [**Can we count on Hoosiers?**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-n/) Together we have enacted so much of the Trump agenda, but the work is just beginning. Thank you for your tireless support. -Team Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-p/) |
---|---|---

[mikebraunforindiana.com](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyutjdy-ukvtrkydy-x/)

name: Mike Siegel
subject: WATCH: new campaign video
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10228240/102539741/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDExYWYwNi1kYmRlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4I9EE0o24I8BPCRPN8jOf6UaAPy4wO-Y3CxzVfi7F8=&emci=a111af06-dbde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=a411af06-dbde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, **Climate change is real, and it is happening now.‬ **My friend Harvey is a pecan farmer who lost his farm and his livelihood—and nearly lost his life—when a coal plant opened next door. ‪The fight against climate change begins with stories like Harvey’s.‬

Today, we are releasing "Can't Bring It Back". Please watch and share this video with as many people as possible. The more visibility we get for this, the greater impact our campaign can have in the fight against climate change.
[Watch and share on Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10228241/102539742/421094233?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDExYWYwNi1kYmRlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4I9EE0o24I8BPCRPN8jOf6UaAPy4wO-Y3CxzVfi7F8=&emci=a111af06-dbde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=a411af06-dbde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172) [Watch and share on Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10228242/102539743/-948418084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDExYWYwNi1kYmRlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4I9EE0o24I8BPCRPN8jOf6UaAPy4wO-Y3CxzVfi7F8=&emci=a111af06-dbde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=a411af06-dbde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
[](https://twitter.com/SiegelForTexas/status/1176466311414788096)
This video follows the story of Harvey Hayek, a former pecan farmer in Fayette County, Texas. Harvey’s trees started to die after the Fayette Coal Plant was opened in 1977. Years later, Harvey began to experience headaches and partially lost his sight. It was discovered that he had developed a brain tumor the size of a grapefruit. The death of Harvey’s pecan orchard, and the monstrous tumor he survived, were both caused by emissions from the coal plant. [**We are in a fight for the future. We need your help to share this video with as many people as you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10228243/102539744/421094233?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDExYWYwNi1kYmRlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4I9EE0o24I8BPCRPN8jOf6UaAPy4wO-Y3CxzVfi7F8=&emci=a111af06-dbde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=a411af06-dbde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)

Mike Siegel

name: Kevin Lata (Margaret Good for Congress)
subject: Our biggest date so far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
I want you to be a part of this huge milestone. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/iCqWxum23h_jE6tcOZ8cqkiyqjdACRpiiGyUWFQij00=/nJJSeNwUeJLJgtIUs27US19dnboy7nmANsXOLQYsnsA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.24_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
Hi friends,

We're 6 days away from the biggest milestone of our campaign so far: **Our first FEC filing deadline.**

Here's what you need to know: On September 30 at 11:59 PM, we'll close the books on our first quarter in the race, and campaigns across the country will submit their fundraising numbers from the last three months to the Federal Election Commission.

**Those numbers are then released in a highly anticipated public report.**

[**Friends, you can click here to chip in toward our $22,000 end-of-quarter goal and make sure you 're part of our campaign before we publicly report our numbers. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iCqWxum23h_jE6tcOZ8cqkiyqjdACRpiiGyUWFQij00=/nJJSeNwUeJLJgtIUs27US19dnboy7nmANsXOLQYsnsA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.24_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

| ********[Chip in now »](https://act.myngp.com/el/iCqWxum23h_jE6tcOZ8cqkiyqjdACRpiiGyUWFQij00=/nJJSeNwUeJLJgtIUs27US19dnboy7nmANsXOLQYsnsA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.24_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---

The deadline that's rapidly approaching in 6 days will determine much of the road ahead for our race. If you have a moment, I'd like to quickly explain why:
1. **This public fundraising report is our first opportunity to prove our strength.** Everyone from potential supporters to pundits will be pouring over our numbers -- both how much we've raised and how many supporters we have -- to determine our viability in the race. It's critical we show we have a powerful grassroots network ready to fight for change.

2. **Special interests and the GOP establishment want to know if we 're a threat to Vern Buchanan.** Spoiler alert: We are -- a big one. A large fundraising total will showcase the broad coalition of supporters that stand behind Margaret and our campaign.

3. **Our first end-of-quarter goal will be the foundation of our campaign budget.** I know this network is capable of building an unstoppable campaign, but between registering voters, hiring a strong staff, and filming digital ads, our race will be expensive. We need to aim high and invest early if we're going to win!

**If you believe in the message we 're spreading across Southwest Florida -- that our representative should work tirelessly and fight for change that will benefit hardworking families -- I want you to be a part of this huge campaign milestone.**

[**Friends, we have 6 days to raise $22,000 and show our opponent, DC special interests, and anyone else watching that we 're in this race to win. Help us finish our first quarter in the race strong with a donation before our FEC public deadline. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iCqWxum23h_jE6tcOZ8cqkiyqjdACRpiiGyUWFQij00=/nJJSeNwUeJLJgtIUs27US19dnboy7nmANsXOLQYsnsA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.24_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

clean_body: I want you to be a part of this huge milestone. | Hi friends, We're 6 days away from the biggest milestone of our campaign so far: Our first FEC filing deadline. Here's what you need to know: On September 30 at 11:59 PM, we'll close the books on our first quarter in the race, and campaigns across the country will submit their fundraising numbers from the last three months to the Federal Election Commission. Those numbers are then released in a highly anticipated public report. | ********** The deadline that's rapidly approaching in 6 days will determine much of the road ahead for our race. If you have a moment, I'd like to quickly explain why: 1. This public fundraising report is our first opportunity to prove our strength. Everyone from potential supporters to pundits will be pouring over our numbers -- both how much we've raised and how many supporters we have -- to determine our viability in the race. It's critical we show we have a powerful grassroots network ready to fight for change. 2. Special interests and the GOP establishment want to know if we 're a threat to Vern Buchanan. Spoiler alert: We are -- a big one. A large fundraising total will showcase the broad coalition of supporters that stand behind Margaret and our campaign. 3. Our first end-of-quarter goal will be the foundation of our campaign budget. I know this network is capable of building an unstoppable campaign, but between registering voters, hiring a strong staff, and filming digital ads, our race will be expensive. We need to aim high and invest early if we're going to win! If you believe in the message we 're spreading across Southwest Florida -- that our representative should work tirelessly and fight for change that will benefit hardworking families -- I want you to be a part of this huge campaign milestone. | ---|--- | | Let's get to work! Kevin Lata Campaign Manager Margaret Good for Congress ********** Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress = Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota FL 34277 United States

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: "Surprisingly effective strategy"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Dear Peter,
We have spent 77 of the past 92 days crisscrossing Iowa, driving over 17,000 miles, and cementing relationships in 235 meetings in a caucus state where relationships to recruit the 1800+ precinct captains you must have on voting day is crucial.
Our different “ground game” was critical for laying the foundation early for February’s caucus voting — and it had practical results.
_National Review:_
* "The Iowa Starting Line blog called Sestak's campaign ‘peculiar' but 'surprisingly effective.'"
* "The editorial board of the Des Moines Register wrote that Sestak 'impresses with experience, smarts and discipline.'"
* "Lots of candidates discuss the downtrodden; Sestak sees the downtrodden as a potential campaign work force and base of support.”

_**We really do need your generosity now**_. My ace Iowa team will fill in the remaining precinct leadership positions **as I head to New Hampshire — where 90% of the primary voters are undecided!**

name: Megan West
subject: VIDEO: Want smaller government? Here’s the solution.
body:
| | An Inspiring Interview with Pastor Todd Wagner
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k-SA3B5rSXvfNbiYDAciqDs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190924com01&n=1)
| Peter, Do you want smaller government and more freedom? Less poverty and more compassion in your community? Pastor Todd Wagner of Watermark Church in Dallas, Texas explains how Christians and the church are the solution. _“A lot of the things government is doing; government shouldn’t have to do. If we, as God’s people are about it...we’re constantly encouraging people to discover, develop and deploy their gifts.”_ –Pastor Todd Wagner Among its many outreach ministries, Watermark Church runs and operates the largest non-insurance health clinic in the country. It’s run by volunteers from the medical community who use their gifts and skills to serve others. And it’s making a huge impact. Pastor Wagner says, “If you're a Christian - your faith should have an effect on you - in every area of your life.” Watermark members have set out to do just that. [Watch this inspiring interview](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k-SA3B5rSXvfNbiYDAciqDs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190924com01&n=2) and be encouraged by what can happen when Christians live transformed lives, seek the welfare of their city, and care for and shepherd others. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k-SA3B5rSXvfNbiYDAciqDs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190924com01&n=3) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k-SA3B5rSXvfNbiYDAciqDs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190924com01&n=4) Pray. Think. Vote. Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190924com01&n=5)
---

A week from today, we'll hit the next FEC fundraising deadline. Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852999a/45c30650/13478685a/668aad5c/3747026973/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Our campaign is facing a powerfully important test.

A week from today, we'll hit the next FEC fundraising deadline. Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward.

The pressure is on. Our campaign is working hard to hit our ambitious goal for this quarter. But here's what you're not going to see me do:

You won't see me holding any fundraisers where only the wealthy can get in by writing a big check.

You won't see me chatting up any billionaires, asking them to fund a Super PAC.

And you definitely won't see me taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

**There's only one way we're raising money on this campaign, and it's with grassroots donors. We're building a movement to fight for working people and we're making sure we answer only to working people.**

[**Can you chip in for the first time right now to help hit our goal before the FEC deadline? $3 or whatever you can afford will make a real difference today.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852999a/45c30650/13478685a/668aad43/3747026973/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KNzVGX0VPUV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MDkyNF9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ75F_EOQ_GRM_E_20190924_V1S3_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

We know the big problems we're up against.

And we know that we need big, structural change to solve those problems.

We need to get organized -- person to person, face to face -- by investing in grassroots, on-the-ground community-building across the country. And we need to lay out big plans to solve real problems.

That's the only way to win in 2020, and we've gotten started. But, we need real resources to keep growing our movement.

**Before the FEC deadline next week, we need to get our fundraising numbers in the best place possible.**

clean_body: A week from today, we'll hit the next FEC fundraising deadline. Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. | | | "" Our campaign is facing a powerfully important test. A week from today, we'll hit the next FEC fundraising deadline. Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. The pressure is on. Our campaign is working hard to hit our ambitious goal for this quarter. But here's what you're not going to see me do: You won't see me holding any fundraisers where only the wealthy can get in by writing a big check. You won't see me chatting up any billionaires, asking them to fund a Super PAC. And you definitely won't see me taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests. There's only one way we're raising money on this campaign, and it's with grassroots donors. We're building a movement to fight for working people and we're making sure we answer only to working people. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" We know the big problems we're up against. And we know that we need big, structural change to solve those problems. We need to get organized -- person to person, face to face -- by investing in grassroots, on-the-ground community-building across the country. And we need to lay out big plans to solve real problems. That's the only way to win in 2020, and we've gotten started. But, we need real resources to keep growing our movement. Before the FEC deadline next week, we need to get our fundraising numbers in the best place possible. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

subject: You can win this year
body:
This is it. There are now just six weekends left between now and Election Day 2019! This November, Hoosiers will be going to the polls to vote.... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=be180dbaea)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e833b04d7d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Indiana Republicans-
This is it. There are now just six weekends left between now and Election Day 2019! This November, Hoosiers will be going to the polls to vote for their leaders closest to them – their mayors, city councilors and other municipal leaders.

Across the state, we have Republican mayors delivering RESULTS – with safer communities, better roads and an excellent quality of life – all while maintaining fiscal responsibility. But it’s up to us to make sure our Republicans local officials GET ELECTED and GET RE-ELECTED so that Hoosiers can experience these results!

**And we need you to make that possible! This is your chance to be a _Republican Superhero_ for our mayoral candidates.**

**We have six opportunities throughout Indiana over the next six weekends for you to volunteer on several down-to-the-wire races where your work could help set our candidates over the top -- making sure that they cross the finish line first!**
**Saturday, September 28**
Fort Wayne Mayoral Candidate Tim Smith
[RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9734e42fee&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Saturday, October 5**
Muncie Mayoral Candidate Dan Ridenour
[RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9a53b453aa&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Saturday, October 12**
Lawrence Mayor Steve Collier
[RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5727ce5fec&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Saturday, October 19**
New Albany Mayoral Candidate Mark Seabrook
[RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb8556d0ad&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Saturday, October 26**
Fort Wayne Mayoral Candidate Tim Smith
[RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8b6b9d09f1&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Saturday, November 2**
State Party HQ Phone Bank
[RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=56c9f70930&e=1acd9bb3d6)
RSVP now at the links above, and let us know if you can help make a difference in these critical races. These races are close, and our grassroots teams on the ground will be the difference-makers for these fantastic candidates!

Thanks for all that you do for your Indiana Republican Party!

Matt Huckleby
Executive Director, Indiana Republican Party

name: Team Zoe
subject: check your registration!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---

| | Friends,

As adults, there are certain things we have to do. Get a yearly physical. Get the oil changed in the car. Go to the dentist to get our teeth cleaned.

[_**Have you added checking your voter registration to that list? If not, here’s your reminder!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10235859/102600809/-1263008137?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY4MjE5Ni1lZmRlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qf9DJG25gJ_P3x7hPD6qegzd8z0ysoNR9Hux6KWW6cc=&emci=2b662eea-eede-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=e4f82196-efde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6468171)

Today is National Voter Registration Day. Voting is our sacred responsibility as citizens. But millions of Americans may find themselves unable to cast their ballots on Election Day because they haven’t checked their voter registration status.

Don’t wait! This upcoming election is one of the most important that our country has ever faced. Make sure you’re registered to vote! [_**Click here to check your registration and learn how you can register in your county.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10235860/102600810/-1694523815?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY4MjE5Ni1lZmRlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qf9DJG25gJ_P3x7hPD6qegzd8z0ysoNR9Hux6KWW6cc=&emci=2b662eea-eede-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=e4f82196-efde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6468171)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10235862/102600812/-1694523815?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY4MjE5Ni1lZmRlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qf9DJG25gJ_P3x7hPD6qegzd8z0ysoNR9Hux6KWW6cc=&emci=2b662eea-eede-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=e4f82196-efde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6468171)
Thank you - and happy voting!

Best,

Team Zoe

subject: Will you help me meet my 3rd quarter fundraising goal today?
body:
There is LESS THAN ONE WEEK until the crucial 3rd quarter fundraising deadline. | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

There is **LESS THAN** **ONE WEEK** until the crucial 3rd quarter fundraising deadline. Will you [partner with me TODAY and contribute $50, $75, or even $100](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=4127fe37ad&e=c1dbff800f) to help fight for our conservative values?

Our campaign is gaining momentum every day, but I need YOUR help to [show Nancy Pelosi that Georgia’s 7thCongressional seat isn’t for the taking](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=d3b7e95cf0&e=c1dbff800f).

The Democrats want to use Forsyth and Gwinnett counties to turn our country into a liberal mess—open borders, sanctuary cities, and socialized medicine. They know I’m the **ONLY** candidate in this race with the grit to take them on. With [your help](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=93ece749fe&e=c1dbff800f), we can make sure this seat is beholden to the people, not Hollywood ideals.

Please consider donating today, [any amount helps](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=6689466067&e=c1dbff800f)!

-Renee

Please consider donating today, ! -Renee | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2019 Unterman for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Two more endorsements!
body:
The dating game show, the Love Connection, was just a little before my time, but the show’s host, Chuck Woolery remains a household name.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348559-808052-4657332-500e1e7add-a05d034d58)
Patriot,

The dating game show, the Love Connection, was just a little before my time, but the show’s host, Chuck Woolery remains a household name.

Mr. Woolery has become an outspoken conservative voice . . . which is so rare coming from Hollywood and entertainment circles.

That’s why I’m so thankful to have earned his support recently.

Last week, Mr. Woolery sent out a tweet directing people to donate to “Laura Loomer for Congress” and 1,700 of his fans retweeted it!

On the same day, I was honored to have one of the bravest women I know endorse me.

Juanita Broaddrick tweeted, “Laura Loomer is running for Congress, Florida District 21. She has my support and endorsement. Florida please support this patriot.”

Mrs. Broaddrick is one of Bill Clinton’s many sexual assault victims – and she’s brave enough to never let the world forget that.

For decades, Mrs. Broaddrick has planted herself in the face of the most powerful couple in the world, Bill and Hillary Clinton, so that no one forgets what happened to her and the other victims of Bill Clinton.

I’m humbled by the support of Mrs. Broaddrick and Mr. Woolery and if you can take a moment to thank them by sending the tweet below, I would be extremely appreciative.

> [**Thank you @atensnut and @chuckwoolery for your support of #LauraLoomerforCongress!! We need Laura Loomer in Congress and your tweets helped her get one step closer to winning on Election Day! Thank you!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348559-808052-4657330-53838d260c-a05d034d58)
With six days until our first FEC filing deadline, **every endorsement and every donation helps in a very big way**.

If you haven’t already done so (or if you can give again), [**please donate today to help hit our fundraising goal by the September 30th deadline**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348559-808052-4657331-55c9304d4f-a05d034d58).

Thank you again for all that you do.

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-348559-808052-84585d41bbe610b-a05d034d58)

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4781/4bd7760e/43453ff1/77e09ee0/280655184/VEsHDQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=18+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190924_SenChallengeSlate_U3_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190924_SenChallengeSlate_U3_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4781/4bd7760e/43453ff1/77e09eef/280655184/VEsHDA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=19+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190924_SenChallengeSlate_U3_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190924_SenChallengeSlate_U3_X2")

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: please read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
For presidential candidates, this month's end-of-quarter deadline is make or break. Some are even saying that if they miss their goal, they may not have a path to victory.
That same thing holds true for campaigns like ours. **We only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes, so every single goal we hit -- or miss -- could be the difference between protecting this seat or handing it back to Republican control.**
My team says that if we're going to raise what we need by September 30th, we have to bring in $4,374 from _this email_ today.
[**$3 or more from you could be the thing that pushes us over the top, so I have to ask you: Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to protect this vulnerable Senate seat? I 'm relying on you, team, and we're really in a pinch.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc396/2a380d31/3da6cbb9/f0dbee/2432625117/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkyNF8xZGF5MV82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190924_1day1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
This campaign is built on people like you giving to emails like this one, and I'm so grateful for your support. But with climate change and access to affordable health care on the line, we really can't risk falling short today.
The truth is that I really need you to step up:
[**If securing our firewall against the worst parts of the Trump administration 's agenda and protecting the future of the Supreme Court is important to you, please click here to help us hit our goal.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc396/2a380d31/3da6cbb9/f0dbef/2432625117/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkyNF8xZGF5MV82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190924_1day1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
This is pretty urgent, so please don't wait. Thanks so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc396/2a380d31/3da6cbb9/f0dbef/2432625117/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkyNF8xZGF5MV82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190924_1day1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _

name: Booker HQ
subject: Hey, you: secure your spot on our Grassroots Donor Wall before it's too late!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Since Cory told you we need to raise $1.7 million by September 30th, thousands of people have stepped up to make sure we can build the grassroots team we need not just to stay in this race, but to win it. And with the new DNC debate stage threshold of 165,000 unique donors, it's more critical than ever that we can count on your support. It's one more reminder that, from the very beginning, this campaign belongs to you. You're building this, **so we 're building a Grassroots Donor Wall featuring the names of everyone who steps up right now as we sprint to reach our $1.7 million goal.** [**Make a donation before our FEC fundraising deadline, be one of the 165,000 unique donors for the next debate stage, and we 'll make sure your name has a spot on our Grassroots Donor Wall.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190924_BHQ_20190924-fr-BHQ-donorwall-ndnrs_ndnrs_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190924_BHQ_20190924-fr-BHQ-donorwall-ndnrs_ndnrs_i1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") A lot of us are putting our all into this campaign. And right now, it's all hands on deck to make sure we meet this fundraising goal. For those of us at HQ, it means a lot of long nights at the office. This visual reminder of all the people fighting alongside us across the country will be an everyday reminder, especially in the toughest moments, that we're not alone. Thanks -- looking forward to seeing your name up on that wall! Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190924_BHQ_20190924-fr-BHQ-donorwall-ndnrs_ndnrs_contribbutton_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bba/5fca0d19/74744d45/291edad0/117949874/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bba/5fca0d19/74744d45/291edadf/117949874/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bba/5fca0d19/74744d45/291edade/117949874/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bba/5fca0d19/74744d45/291edadd/117949874/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bba/5fca0d19/74744d45/291edadc/117949874/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bba/5fca0d19/74744d45/291edad0/117949874/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Voting Has Already Begun
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Vote absentee and encourage your friends to do the same
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,
Election Day is only 42 days away and absentee voting is already underway.
We need your help to win every last vote to make sure that Republicans remain in the majority in the legislature.
To make sure every last supporter has cast their ballot, we have launched an absentee ballot program designed to encourage our supporters to vote absentee.
---
| | | [Download and View Jill Vogel's Absentee Voter Guide](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tDk2oK4UCOlXIv5oBOewoKigwjjEyUTOao0yUfRwYfs6th3xYh2HKtS1arEOxNy5H4zM2ERWjQ3uPPlrf1Ea6VHy3ArAokrHHkph7Nn-m95LY8Uc-uQEjo4qAglYowlVvDtCiCsG5PY_D1qP1sg35NvQ5B55ipUhiUFTNQnU6oDwex0YUR42ljBv6daRfWPmdEX2nlmR-zIsmcZEixDWVwIMhVRHjBgrwABieiizw2c=&c=gQYda55FsgHfPJczU5FYq7MoeEKxWFs7qSbsxc_QpWAzrMzyHZjE4w==&ch=qGXzbyIPhwBEHoAA_KoVRtWtMt4Dv-KotTDFvhF32sE01bM145oyug==)
---
| Absentee voters may also [apply online through Virginia's secure website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tDk2oK4UCOlXIv5oBOewoKigwjjEyUTOao0yUfRwYfs6th3xYh2HKn4krijn4LQLKB7wrgZiSDOmSDy60uH2-lgon4wbC7bkcahomrtj9EyGf1_NIVuFX4zUmmYGHGUszW_Sx--RXUP9sjE6YISeqDlHflHkYoN_usmWob0Jmp_ULA7YSkQSVg==&c=gQYda55FsgHfPJczU5FYq7MoeEKxWFs7qSbsxc_QpWAzrMzyHZjE4w==&ch=qGXzbyIPhwBEHoAA_KoVRtWtMt4Dv-KotTDFvhF32sE01bM145oyug==).
We encourage all qualifying voters to vote absentee because it eliminates any risk you might be too busy to vote or get stuck in traffic on Election Day. When you vote absentee now, you can be sure your vote will be counted.
You can help Jill with her absentee program in two ways:

1. View the guidelines and apply for an absentee ballot, if you qualify.
2. [Download our absentee voter guide](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tDk2oK4UCOlXIv5oBOewoKigwjjEyUTOao0yUfRwYfs6th3xYh2HKtS1arEOxNy5H4zM2ERWjQ3uPPlrf1Ea6VHy3ArAokrHHkph7Nn-m95LY8Uc-uQEjo4qAglYowlVvDtCiCsG5PY_D1qP1sg35NvQ5B55ipUhiUFTNQnU6oDwex0YUR42ljBv6daRfWPmdEX2nlmR-zIsmcZEixDWVwIMhVRHjBgrwABieiizw2c=&c=gQYda55FsgHfPJczU5FYq7MoeEKxWFs7qSbsxc_QpWAzrMzyHZjE4w==&ch=qGXzbyIPhwBEHoAA_KoVRtWtMt4Dv-KotTDFvhF32sE01bM145oyug==) and email it to all of your Republican friends. Tell them a little bit about why you support Jill and ask them to vote absentee, if they qualify.

If you know anyone who has any questions ask them to email info@senatorjillvogel.com so our team can help them apply for their absentee ballot. All requests must be received by 5:00 PM on Tuesday, October 29th. Postmarks do not count. Absentee ballots are due by 7:00 PM on Election Day.
Qualifying voters may cast an absentee ballot in-person through June 10th. For a list of locations, please contact your county registrar or [find your early voting location through the Department of Election's online system](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tDk2oK4UCOlXIv5oBOewoKigwjjEyUTOao0yUfRwYfs6th3xYh2HKn4krijn4LQLKB7wrgZiSDOmSDy60uH2-lgon4wbC7bkcahomrtj9EyGf1_NIVuFX4zUmmYGHGUszW_Sx--RXUP9sjE6YISeqDlHflHkYoN_usmWob0Jmp_ULA7YSkQSVg==&c=gQYda55FsgHfPJczU5FYq7MoeEKxWFs7qSbsxc_QpWAzrMzyHZjE4w==&ch=qGXzbyIPhwBEHoAA_KoVRtWtMt4Dv-KotTDFvhF32sE01bM145oyug==).
Absentee voting by mail is safe and secure. You can use the [Department of Election's website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tDk2oK4UCOlXIv5oBOewoKigwjjEyUTOao0yUfRwYfs6th3xYh2HKn4krijn4LQLKB7wrgZiSDOmSDy60uH2-lgon4wbC7bkcahomrtj9EyGf1_NIVuFX4zUmmYGHGUszW_Sx--RXUP9sjE6YISeqDlHflHkYoN_usmWob0Jmp_ULA7YSkQSVg==&c=gQYda55FsgHfPJczU5FYq7MoeEKxWFs7qSbsxc_QpWAzrMzyHZjE4w==&ch=qGXzbyIPhwBEHoAA_KoVRtWtMt4Dv-KotTDFvhF32sE01bM145oyug==) to check when your ballot has been received. By law, all absentee ballots must be accounted for. Ballots are secret and nobody will know how you vote.
If you have any questions about voting absentee, need help applying for your absentee ballot, or need tips on how to encourage your family, friends, and neighbors to do the same, please email [Info@SenatorJillVogel.com](mailto:Info@SenatorJillVogel.com). Below please find the official list of qualifying reasons for voting absentee. Thank you for your help.
Sincerely,

---
| | |
---|---
|

Jill Vogel

Qualifying Reasons to Vote Absentee
|
---
| |
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186

name: Elisa
subject: Time to get off the sidelines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10237977/102620462/979390018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWQ4N2I5NS1mY2RlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJ3Wy-7bL8J7zyINjehGA_jlyDgvHmUxFYaUDplIbUM=&emci=16d87b95-fcde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=19d87b95-fcde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
Peter,
I’m sure by now your inbox is filled with emails from candidates asking you to donate this week before the **FEC deadline on Monday night**. I want to take a minute and explain why this public fundraising report is so critical for our race.

We’ve had an exciting summer on the campaign trail. From being rated as one of the [**top 18 seats most likely to flip for Democrats in the entire country**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10237978/102620463/-1751489475?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWQ4N2I5NS1mY2RlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJ3Wy-7bL8J7zyINjehGA_jlyDgvHmUxFYaUDplIbUM=&emci=16d87b95-fcde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=19d87b95-fcde-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474) to receiving our first two endorsements, we are gaining momentum and all eyes are on us and the numbers we report this quarter.
When this report becomes public in two weeks, it will show just how badly folks like you want to flip this seat. **We have no primary opponent, so we are taking this fight straight to Dan Crenshaw.** I am counting on supporters like you to jump in now and show just how motivated we are to flip TX-02 next year.
No contribution is too small or too big (although the individual max is $2800 for the primary)!**Can you chip in today and be a part of our grassroots movement? **

body:
[1]Beto for America

At the end of the month, we’ll submit an official fundraising report to
the Federal Election Commission. They publish it on FEC.gov, where anyone
can download a PDF file detailing how much we’ve raised for Beto. When you
search Beto’s name now, you see $13,020,990.72 — what we raised through
last quarter:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34953?refcode=ema20190924-57148&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=57148%2E444211%2EIJB5Cn ]What we've raised

Once this number gets updated after the September deadline, reporters and
our opponents will compare our fundraising to other candidates. We want to
make sure Beto’s numbers show we have momentum. That’s why we really need
to raise $750,000 more through the end of the month.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34953?refcode=ema20190924-57148&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=57148%2E444211%2EIJB5Cn ]Can you help us meet our goal by chipping in $3 (or
another amount) today? Every donation helps us get there — no matter how
big or small.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34953?refcode=ema20190924-57148&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=57148%2E444211%2EIJB5Cn ]Contribute $3

These numbers may seem daunting, but don’t worry! There are a lot of us
supporting Beto out there. And if each person donates a little bit, we’ll
meet our goal in no time and post a good report to the FEC website.

Thanks,

Team Beto

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I’ll make this short (new DNC debate thresholds announced)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Qualifying for these debates is critical to our path to victory. We need every ounce of time in front of a national audience of Democrats if we’re going to win and take on the establishment candidates with higher name recognition.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=650%2E377263%2E3zRrl6) Team --

The DNC just announced that we must reach 3% in four qualifying polls or 5% in two early state polls between now and a week before the November debate.

Qualifying for these debates is critical to our path to victory. We need every ounce of time in front of a national audience of Democrats if we’re going to win and take on the establishment candidates with higher name recognition.

**My team has built a plan that will ensure we qualify for the debates -- but we must raise $1,500,000 by midnight on September 30th (our FEC deadline) to fully execute it.**

[ **Can you rush $5 right now towards our goal so we can qualify for these debates? If you want my voice on that stage, then I need you to donate now. ** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10860?t=5&akid=650%2E377263%2E3zRrl6) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10860?t=8&akid=650%2E377263%2E3zRrl6)
---
We’re publicly posting our goal on our website. That means other campaigns, the media, and everyone watching will see whether we hit this big goal or fall short.

I’m counting on you, Yang Gang. Let’s show the country what this movement is made of. [**Pitch in what you can now.** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10860?t=7&akid=650%2E377263%2E3zRrl6)

-Andrew

Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.
[DONATE NOW](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10860?t=6&akid=650%2E377263%2E3zRrl6)
---

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: [Primary Challenge Update] Six days till FEC deadline, Ed needs your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| **CNN: Rep. Joe Kennedy III kicks off primary challenge against Sen. Ed Markey**

_**[Rush $27 or more to stand with Ed before the FEC deadline!](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092419_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Team: Ed Markey is on the front lines of the fights that define our times, and he's ready to win.

Our first FEC deadline since Rep. Joe Kenny III launched his primary campaign against Ed is in six days, and our public FEC fundraising report must show that Ed's people-powered campaign is stronger than ever.

**[Please: Pitch in $27 now and show you stand with Ed](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092419_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Support for Ed is broad, diverse, deep, and growing!

✅Elizabeth Warren is standing with Ed.
✅Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez endorsed Ed because he is a champion for our progressive values.
✅AFSCME Council 93, which represents 30,000 local and state government employees is all in for Ed.
✅Progressive organizations like NARAL, LCV Action Fund, Coalition for Social Justice, the Sierra Club, the Sunrise Movement, 350 Mass Action, and more are standing with Ed.
✅And 73% of the Massachusetts state legislature is with Ed.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Greta Thunberg excoriates global leaders at U.N.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, World leaders are meeting in New York this week for the U.N. Climate Change Summit, while student-led protests across the globe are calling out these same leaders for their inaction and slow response to the growing crisis. Youth activist Greta Thunberg, who was a panelist, offered harsh criticism to the global leaders gathered, saying, "you all come to us young people for hope...You have stolen my dreams and my childhood with your empty words...How dare you?" According to a recent _Washington Post_ survey, almost 60 percent of American teens are scared of climate change and its effects on the planet. They rank it as one of the most important issues facing the country, along with gun policy and healthcare. However, over half of them also said that they are motivated to do something about it, and a quarter of them have already taken concrete actions. We're investigating what engaged voters think about this issue and need 179 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Will the climate crisis determine your vote in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd34/6e9863e8/14e1cf35/1db0d5a1/1414576860/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-pgP8vy1") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd34/6e9863e8/14e1cf35/1db0d5a1/1414576860/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-pgP8vy1") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd34/6e9863e8/14e1cf35/1db0d5a0/1414576860/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190924a.ND-b&refcode2=S7G8fziqLMv0eoM1MAtL")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Stands Up for Religious Freedom
body:
Yesterday, President Trump became the first American President to convene a meeting at the United Nations on religious freedom, as he kicked off... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a13dfcb96&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Stands Up for Religious Freedom**

Yesterday, President Trump became the first American President to convene a meeting at the United Nations on religious freedom, as he kicked off the U.N. General Assembly’s annual session with a “Global Call to Protect Religious Freedom,” writes Kelsey Zorzi, President of the U.N.’s NGO Committee on Freedom of Religion or Belief, in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“Flanked by Secretary-General António Guterres and Vice President Mike Pence, the president declared: ‘No right is more fundamental to a peaceful, prosperous, flourishing society than religious freedom, yet it is rare around the world. As we speak, many people of faith are being jailed, murdered, often at the hands of their own government.’”

Calling this issue an “urgent moral duty,” the President “announced that the U.S. is committing $25 million to religious-freedom efforts and launching a coalition of businesses for religious freedom.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8fbfc0ded&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump and Polish President Andrzej Duda signed a defense agreement Monday that will shift U.S. soldiers into Poland at the Eastern European nation’s expense,” Tom Howell Jr. reports in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6bfbecaa7f&e=3ee4985eea). “They’re going to be building us facilities that I’m sure will be very beautiful,” the President said in a bilateral meeting at the U.N. General Assembly. “During a White House visit in June, Mr. Duda said Poland agreed to house about 1,000 U.S. soldiers on its soil. Mr. Trump also said the U.S. is making Poland eligible for the visa-waiver program to ease travel between the countries.”
---
|
---
| “Fueled by lax laws, promises of sanctuary, and a growing threat to shut down the U.S.-Mexico border, the illegal immigrant population in the United States has surged nearly 2 million to 14.3 million, according to a new calculation from a key immigration policy group,” Paul Bedard writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ccb98c4233&e=3ee4985eea). “Citing several reasons for the growth over the past two years, the Federation for American Immigration Reform said the total could jump to 21 million in just six years without reforms to stop illegal immigration and improve legal entry.”
---
|
---
| In [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c726b3357b&e=3ee4985eea), Heritage Foundation President Kay Coles James writes that the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) sets us on a course for freer trade with Canada and Mexico, thereby advancing our Nation’s economic growth. “The United States should be doing all it can to maintain a strong economy while protecting Americans’ wallets and jobs.” James explains that trade issues “aren’t just the concern of policy wonks — they’re critical to the American way of life.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1896649c0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3369fb42c7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6b57b9c83a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Those of us lucky enough to work full-time on this campaign do so in service of you and all the other grassroots donors, volunteers, and supporters pouring your heart into this cause.

I've included a short memo below reporting to you on two big pieces of news on investments we're making:

We can't promise to get back to everyone, but we promise to read every message. Thanks for everything, and hope to see you on the road. -roger

Roger Lau
Campaign Manager
Warren for President

**_Strategy Memo, September 2019_**

At the start of this campaign, we laid out how Elizabeth is going to win the primary and the general election -- by identifying the deep problems the country faces, creating plans to solve them, and building a grassroots movement to win in 2020 and make big, structural change in 2021 and beyond. And that's exactly what our campaign has been doing.

We've released dozens of plans in the past seven months, but they're really one big, simple plan: to break the stranglehold of corruption on Washington and put political and economic power in the hands of the people, where it belongs.

**Elizabeth is the president America needs to tackle the corruption that's put opportunity out of reach for too many Americans** -- corruption that's rotting and undermining our democracy. She believes that big, structural change is how we're going to fix a government that works for the wealthy and well-connected and kicks dirt on everyone else.

>From guaranteeing universal child care to canceling student loan debt; to ensuring tuition-free technical school, community college, and public universities; to reforming our broken immigration system; to fixing our unjust criminal justice system; to making sure that the people with the biggest fortunes pay their fair share in taxes, she's got a plan for that. And more.

Her agenda isn't just bold -- it's popular across the country, with Democrats, independents, and Republicans. Seventy-four percent of people, including a majority of Republicans, support Elizabeth's Ultra-Millionaire Tax1, which would require the top 0.1% of Americans to pay a two-cent tax on every dollar of net worth over $50 million.

A majority of Americans (including people who don't even have student debt) support her student loan debt cancelation plan, which would cancel student debt for 95% of Americans who carry it and make a significant stride in closing the racial wealth gap.2 And 76% of Americans support Elizabeth's Social Security plan, which would immediately increase benefits for everyone by $200 a month and extend the solvency of Social Security for nearly two decades.3

**To win in 2020 and get all this done, we need to keep building our grassroots movement -- and here's what we've already accomplished:**
* **Elizabeth has focused her time on meeting as many voters as possible.** Since the start of this campaign, Elizabeth has taken more than 600 unfiltered questions at 134 town halls in 27 states and Puerto Rico -- and taken over 60,000 selfies (at more than 120 hours in selfie lines!). This includes more than 100 events in the first four states that vote: Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina. Elizabeth has held over 100 media avails with reporters and done hundreds of interviews while answering thousands of questions from the press. She's also been able to visit parts of the country that are often overlooked in a Democratic primary, from highlighting the need for safe, affordable housing in the Mississippi Delta to sharing her plan to protect public lands in Utah to talking about her plan to tackle the opioid crisis in the tiny town of Kermit, West Virginia.

* **We've built a strong grassroots organization in all four of the early states,** with dozens of offices opened and hundreds of full-time organizers on the ground talking with caucus-goers and voters every single day. Together, our supporters have already personally contacted hundreds of thousands of voters in these four states alone.

* **It's all powered by over a million donations from all 50 states, D.C., and Puerto Rico -- and Elizabeth doesn't spend any time catering to wealthy donors.** Elizabeth made a decision not to spend her time courting wealthy contributors, which means no phone calls to schmooze deep-pocketed donors or thousand-dollar-a-plate dinners behind closed doors. Instead, she's been able to make hundreds of phone calls to thank grassroots donors -- who've chipped in any amount, even just $1 -- and hear what got them in this fight. **[If you make a contribution today, you could be on the phone with Elizabeth yourself.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285299b0/45c30650/1346db593/668d4b8c/3567356746/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMDlGX01NT19TVFJfUl8yMDE5MDkyNF9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ09F_MMO_STR_R_20190924_V1S3_P")**

**What's next**

As we head into the fall, here's how we'll build on our progress, build out our team, and keep growing the movement that will elect Elizabeth and elect Democrats up and down the ballot next November:

* **We're launching an eight-figure digital and TV advertising campaign** in Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina to make sure we're getting Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change in front of voters and caucus-goers. If you've been to one of our campaign events in the early states or across the country, chances are you might be part of our ads. Right now, our biggest expense as a campaign is our staff, but as the campaign heats up, it will be on media to reach potential voters. Because we're 100% grassroots funded, we've built our team to spend your dollars as effectively as possible to help deliver victory. That means targeting our spend as precisely as possible to reach the people we need to turn out. It will be more digital than old-school broadcast television, and we have built an in-house staff to produce videos and ads rather than adopt the consultant-driven approach of other campaigns (and the big commissions and fees that come along with it). [**See some samples of what will be running here.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285299b0/45c30650/1346db593/668d4bd3/3567356746/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUowOUZfTU1PX1NUUl9SXzIwMTkwOTI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/first-ad-campaign?source=EMJ09F_MMO_STR_R_20190924_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

* **We're hiring state directors and organizers in a number of states that have primaries and caucuses in March. And we're targeting our resources to invest in places that will be critical to keeping the House, taking back the U.S. Senate, and regaining ground in key state legislatures in 2020.** That includes states like Illinois and California, where Democrats won a whole bunch of House seats in 2018 in close elections that we'll need to defend. It also includes states like Maine, which has a competitive Senate race and Georgia, where there will be two Senate seats up for election.

Because of redistricting after 2020, Democratic gains in Congress and in the state legislatures could be erased if we let Republican-controlled state legislatures draw gerrymandered maps for 2022. So we're putting boots on the ground in places like Michigan and Minnesota, which will help flip state legislatures to Democratic control. And we're continuing to build the future of our party by investing in states like Texas and Florida. Remember: this election is about more than just beating Donald Trump -- he's just the worst symptom of a corrupt system. If we want to make big, structural change, we need to make sure Democrats control the U.S. House and Senate and win important gubernatorial and state legislative races across the country.

* **We're expanding our efforts knocking on doors, making calls, and texting voters across the country.** Our grassroots supporters have already held thousands of house parties and are making face-to-face connections with voters in their communities every day. We've trained thousands of supporters at our barnstorms and Warren Weekend events. Our campaign is using Reach -- a canvassing app designed to encourage voter conversations anytime and anywhere -- to empower Team Warren volunteers across the country to have meaningful conversations with people in their lives about the issues they care about and how they'd like to join our movement. (**[Want to learn more about Reach? Sign up for a training!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285299b0/45c30650/1346db593/668d4bd4/3567356746/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUowOUZfTU1PX1NUUl9SXzIwMTkwOTI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://events.elizabethwarren.com/event/112385/?utm_source=EMJ09F_MMO_STR_R_20190924_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&first_name=&last_name=&zip=18326")**)

I'm grateful for everything you do for this campaign, and I couldn't be more proud of what our team has already accomplished.

Across the country, volunteers are working their hearts out -- knocking on doors in the summer heat, making phone calls for a few hours a week after work, sending text messages that bring more people into the fight, inviting friends and neighbors over for house parties to talk about how they can get involved, and building this movement.

This is how we dream big, fight hard, and win. We've got a plan to make sure Elizabeth is the next president of the United States. And when she's in the Oval Office -- when our plans go from big ideas to reality with the help of this grassroots movement -- I want you to know that you helped make it happen.

**[Please pitch in to help elect Elizabeth and make the big, structural changes our country desperately needs. We're going to win-- as long as we keep fighting side by side.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285299b0/45c30650/1346db593/668d4b8c/3567356746/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMDlGX01NT19TVFJfUl8yMDE5MDkyNF9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ09F_MMO_STR_R_20190924_V1S3_P")**

clean_body: I've included a short memo reporting to you on two big pieces of news on investments we're making: | | | "" Those of us lucky enough to work full-time on this campaign do so in service of you and all the other grassroots donors, volunteers, and supporters pouring your heart into this cause. I've included a short memo below reporting to you on two big pieces of news on investments we're making: 1. To launch an eight-figure TV and digital advertising campaign to make our case to primary voters in the first four states 2. To significantly expand our organizing team into additional states that vote after the first four I hope you'll take a look. But first, a quick and important plug: Grassroots supporters like you make this progress possible. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" We're keen to hear what you think. It's going to take all of us working together to win this, so please reply to this email with your feedback and thoughts. We can't promise to get back to everyone, but we promise to read every message. Thanks for everything, and hope to see you on the road. -roger Roger Lau Campaign Manager Warren for President Strategy Memo, September 2019 At the start of this campaign, we laid out how Elizabeth is going to win the primary and the general election -- by identifying the deep problems the country faces, creating plans to solve them, and building a grassroots movement to win in 2020 and make big, structural change in 2021 and beyond. And that's exactly what our campaign has been doing. We've released dozens of plans in the past seven months, but they're really one big, simple plan: to break the stranglehold of corruption on Washington and put political and economic power in the hands of the people, where it belongs. Elizabeth is the president America needs to tackle the corruption that's put opportunity out of reach for too many Americans -- corruption that's rotting and undermining our democracy. She believes that big, structural change is how we're going to fix a government that works for the wealthy and well-connected and kicks dirt on everyone else. From guaranteeing universal child care to canceling student loan debt; to ensuring tuition-free technical school, community college, and public universities; to reforming our broken immigration system; to fixing our unjust criminal justice system; to making sure that the people with the biggest fortunes pay their fair share in taxes, she's got a plan for that. And more. Her agenda isn't just bold -- it's popular across the country, with Democrats, independents, and Republicans. Seventy-four percent of people, including a majority of Republicans, support Elizabeth's Ultra-Millionaire Tax1, which would require the top 0.1% of Americans to pay a two-cent tax on every dollar of net worth over $50 million. A majority of Americans (including people who don't even have student debt) support her student loan debt cancelation plan, which would cancel student debt for 95% of Americans who carry it and make a significant stride in closing the racial wealth gap.2 And 76% of Americans support Elizabeth's Social Security plan, which would immediately increase benefits for everyone by $200 a month and extend the solvency of Social Security for nearly two decades.3 To win in 2020 and get all this done, we need to keep building our grassroots movement -- and here's what we've already accomplished: Elizabeth has focused her time on meeting as many voters as possible. Since the start of this campaign, Elizabeth has taken more than 600 unfiltered questions at 134 town halls in 27 states and Puerto Rico -- and taken over 60,000 selfies (at more than 120 hours in selfie lines!). This includes more than 100 events in the first four states that vote: Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina. Elizabeth has held over 100 media avails with reporters and done hundreds of interviews while answering thousands of questions from the press. She's also been able to visit parts of the country that are often overlooked in a Democratic primary, from highlighting the need for safe, affordable housing in the Mississippi Delta to sharing her plan to protect public lands in Utah to talking about her plan to tackle the opioid crisis in the tiny town of Kermit, West Virginia. We've built a strong grassroots organization in all four of the early states, with dozens of offices opened and hundreds of full-time organizers on the ground talking with caucus-goers and voters every single day. Together, our supporters have already personally contacted hundreds of thousands of voters in these four states alone. It's all powered by over a million donations from all 50 states, D.C., and Puerto Rico -- and Elizabeth doesn't spend any time catering to wealthy donors. Elizabeth made a decision not to spend her time courting wealthy contributors, which means no phone calls to schmooze deep-pocketed donors or thousand-dollar-a-plate dinners behind closed doors. Instead, she's been able to make hundreds of phone calls to thank grassroots donors -- who've chipped in any amount, even just $1 -- and hear what got them in this fight. "" What's next As we head into the fall, here's how we'll build on our progress, build out our team, and keep growing the movement that will elect Elizabeth and elect Democrats up and down the ballot next November: We're launching an eight-figure digital and TV advertising campaign in Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina to make sure we're getting Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change in front of voters and caucus-goers. If you've been to one of our campaign events in the early states or across the country, chances are you might be part of our ads. Right now, our biggest expense as a campaign is our staff, but as the campaign heats up, it will be on media to reach potential voters. Because we're 100% grassroots funded, we've built our team to spend your dollars as effectively as possible to help deliver victory. That means targeting our spend as precisely as possible to reach the people we need to turn out. It will be more digital than old-school broadcast television, and we have built an in-house staff to produce videos and ads rather than adopt the consultant-driven approach of other campaigns (and the big commissions and fees that come along with it). "" We're hiring state directors and organizers in a number of states that have primaries and caucuses in March. And we're targeting our resources to invest in places that will be critical to keeping the House, taking back the U.S. Senate, and regaining ground in key state legislatures in 2020. That includes states like Illinois and California, where Democrats won a whole bunch of House seats in 2018 in close elections that we'll need to defend. It also includes states like Maine, which has a competitive Senate race and Georgia, where there will be two Senate seats up for election. Because of redistricting after 2020, Democratic gains in Congress and in the state legislatures could be erased if we let Republican-controlled state legislatures draw gerrymandered maps for 2022. So we're putting boots on the ground in places like Michigan and Minnesota, which will help flip state legislatures to Democratic control. And we're continuing to build the future of our party by investing in states like Texas and Florida. Remember: this election is about more than just beating Donald Trump -- he's just the worst symptom of a corrupt system. If we want to make big, structural change, we need to make sure Democrats control the U.S. House and Senate and win important gubernatorial and state legislative races across the country. We're expanding our efforts knocking on doors, making calls, and texting voters across the country. Our grassroots supporters have already held thousands of house parties and are making face-to-face connections with voters in their communities every day. We've trained thousands of supporters at our barnstorms and Warren Weekend events. Our campaign is using Reach -- a canvassing app designed to encourage voter conversations anytime and anywhere -- to empower Team Warren volunteers across the country to have meaningful conversations with people in their lives about the issues they care about and how they'd like to join our movement. ( "") I'm grateful for everything you do for this campaign, and I couldn't be more proud of what our team has already accomplished. Across the country, volunteers are working their hearts out -- knocking on doors in the summer heat, making phone calls for a few hours a week after work, sending text messages that bring more people into the fight, inviting friends and neighbors over for house parties to talk about how they can get involved, and building this movement. This is how we dream big, fight hard, and win. We've got a plan to make sure Elizabeth is the next president of the United States. And when she's in the Oval Office -- when our plans go from big ideas to reality with the help of this grassroots movement -- I want you to know that you helped make it happen. "" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" "" 1\. "" 2\. "" 3\. "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116
