name: Jordan Overstreet
subject: status update for IA-Sen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Can you donate to our campaign ahead of our first quarterly deadline? Insiders will be scrutinizing the amount of money we raise and the number of supporters we get.
|
---

| | Friends, Around this time every month, I'm going to check our donor records and give Mike a status update on our race. Are we on track to reach our goals? How many donors do we have? Today's the first time I pulled the numbers for our report. When I did, I noticed that you haven't become a donor yet: | **Name** : Proud Member of Team Franken
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor:** Not Yet
**How you can help** : [**Chip in $3 or more >>**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2462/33365068/4a662511/3f8bac06/1207305173/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190924_em_nd_record")
---
If we're going to send Mike to Washington to fight for progressive Iowa values, we need to hit our $50,000 end of quarter goal.
Let me explain further.
At the end of the week, we're going to report our end of quarter fundraising numbers, and those numbers are going to tell a story. The story will either be that we have the kind of operation that can win this primary and beat Joni Ernst next fall ... or that we don't.
I know we've built a first-class, grassroots campaign. You know it, too. But we only get one chance to make a first impression to the rest of the world, and we can't afford for it to be a bad one.
[**We're only a few days out from the end of the quarter. We still need to reach our $50,000 goal. That's why we're asking, friends: Donate $3 or more today to help us reach this end of quarter goal.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2462/33365068/4a662511/3f8bac07/1207305173/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190924_em_nd")
Thank you,
Jordan Overstreet
Campaign Manager

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: It's National Voter Registration Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,
Today is National Voter Registration Day & we're registering as many voters as possible. It is our top priority to ensure that every voter can make it to the ballot box without obstacle. Equal opportunity to make your voice heard is your right, and today, we're doing everything we can to get people registered and keep them that way.
Our GOP Secretary of State Mac Warner only wants to purge voters, not register them to vote. It's clear that his intentions aren't to provide the opportunity to vote, but suppress Democratic voters in West Virginia.
Do you need to check your registration? Maybe you moved or changed your name? Whatever the case, make sure you check your voter registration today and update your information if you need to. Not registered to vote? You can do all of this today on [iwillvote.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10242893/102670252/327637188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDdkNDEzMi0xMWRmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bkb1nE_mTZO0s4yTX6lyRryWUOQ_s2FfD7ZhoLNevOQ=&emci=fffe4ba1-f7de-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=bd7d4132-11df-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=5094937).

name: Election Alert
subject: Six Weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Thanks to you, Andy enters the homestretch with the energy and momentum in this race. But it is going to come down to the wire.
|
---

| | Peter,

Six weeks. That's all that's left.

Thanks to you, Andy enters the homestretch with the energy and momentum in this race. But it is going to come down to the wire.

Right now, we are making big spending decisions for our Get Out The Vote program. This GOTV effort will be the biggest and strongest voter turnout operation in Kentucky's history. But we need to make sure we can fully fund this program. **And as of right now, we are $3,641 short of where we need to be. name: Dave Lindstrom
subject: [SURVEY ENCLOSED] Response Requested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindstrom for Senate
body:
I've been emailing you a lot lately to ask for your support. But now I'm asking for it in a different way. I need your help to shape my strategy -

Peter,
I've been emailing you a lot lately to ask for your support.
But now I'm asking for it in a different way.

I need your help to shape my strategy - your feedback on what's most important to Kansas families.
[**That's why I've selected you to take my OFFICIAL 2019 ISSUES SURVEY**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=811545b9d24e4bb4ac16c992c6a5fbd6&_e=SS4fFP3bLXnVQeL8amy4PqrpFS6TDIR5EegNKhXsW5TWXpMuz7HFv6ATA3ARp6qxCbtYXvOlYd4Y15IuTt8kBAFlK22VuPc3NrByaeOXXaDdsrHeb9SYwh1oEgETB3nMjM8Zs5vI1Ra8zM3VEg7sm0rl6rWHKKDdPh_rkcRA2dBHehG4SqWzryMrZH-3VN9P5SHkj0ZMU7l6VkH3H3BzAmwscJaISSZdTSKlH2ywoK76ga3r0zFdmL7L9SYJXLLr9vuv9gUTzpq55wcjojX_D6OPvHjZURvKyNdA6zwtveYfVVgoHlbHU_DyVd4oliB7FX4UY4VrZQezedBsrdb9ky2EoqUQ4_JjhVuwzgCaF_zD0keV178J6b_-Q6RmoNl5jHr9N07DmPEHmIUWinr6Qw%3D%3D), which my team and I will use to plan our tactics for this election.
****[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=811545b9d24e4bb4ac16c992c6a5fbd6&_e=SS4fFP3bLXnVQeL8amy4PqrpFS6TDIR5EegNKhXsW5TWXpMuz7HFv6ATA3ARp6qxCbtYXvOlYd4Y15IuTt8kBAFlK22VuPc3NrByaeOXXaDdsrHeb9SYwh1oEgETB3nMjM8Zs5vI1Ra8zM3VEg7sm0rl6rWHKKDdPh_rkcRA2dDKSONhm1BR9b0EGmrHSW6fVW-PVGDx_6iS93J0lLcrKAZVXZDKf8WcTzdNo03GgrBl15ihu-ggm9SqYyJxosmV7BQGAvKzzxEDl8O_uw9xQM7AeKHHW_9_n7Ku4Os_lsfKNw7K_Q7DRMfDh5CmEp6iHoBIEd9f1VqDlYLlIOPPsQDxMgFHFO8yAu5LGozDKDR4GEubqppzEqFqFs4WfGpkwEs5CLOQhAjdQBtpQAXWDA%3D%3D)****
---
You see Peter, I've been traveling around Kansas for months, speaking with residents in every corner of our state, from every walk of life.
Each of them has a story. Issues they care about. Values they want to protect.
That's why I need to hear from you, to ensure that I get advice on the issues to focus on from all around Kansas.**[Don't let your area be underrepresented!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=811545b9d24e4bb4ac16c992c6a5fbd6&_e=SS4fFP3bLXnVQeL8amy4PqrpFS6TDIR5EegNKhXsW5TWXpMuz7HFv6ATA3ARp6qxCbtYXvOlYd4Y15IuTt8kBAFlK22VuPc3NrByaeOXXaDdsrHeb9SYwh1oEgETB3nMjM8Zs5vI1Ra8zM3VEg7sm0rl6rWHKKDdPh_rkcRA2dD6FnrYjoEf_fEjFxgQDgbohqe6xBdXJObUj3zsx5XtV-vs1MJH5C964MlZe3aNNurDzOn3ixlY38LT6xArXj5vsL7oqSg7VBlICWY-BxkYYzJOL3xvP_OFHT9Jnuu6TiUG-ElLwQyTQ5KjEgViS_deTjc1Axe1tXooNrhWnpxIXpifAVGrdsSiyla710oilfnWmtlMn4OkjrwdME9ii0vusEWFy-jvBJiXJVRuwyYMxw%3D%3D)**[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=811545b9d24e4bb4ac16c992c6a5fbd6&_e=SS4fFP3bLXnVQeL8amy4PqrpFS6TDIR5EegNKhXsW5TWXpMuz7HFv6ATA3ARp6qxCbtYXvOlYd4Y15IuTt8kBAFlK22VuPc3NrByaeOXXaDdsrHeb9SYwh1oEgETB3nMjM8Zs5vI1Ra8zM3VEg7sm0rl6rWHKKDdPh_rkcRA2dDpnKwDZSxGDmHPUy94BR06hcXsXTYtruhDJiAAzuoVU-IkDmgeV0NnWi5JNjT735QlQsKbe6eTncQYfBq6yEZOIlD1Pnp0BkkNvrs6VdfxvGbKsrsfedHabxWjbb1COG22Q7i27xGadi80uKEBmEMaKKFfdExplkd1sNhKWZQuxEePL72HbejRMLtKrOt-uLt7WnmiQcZ4OyG9fmMs0-MsdmkwKPbbc8OlATrRN7fryw%3D%3D)
Peter, I’ve heard the stories of the working family struggling to get by, who would be hurt by socialistic, liberal policies like Medicare for All. I’ve met the kids who want to see improved schools and brighter futures. I’ve seen the great talent we cultivate here in Kansas pack their bags and move away.
If we’re going to fight for our state – and our country – we’re going to have to do it together.
That’s why it’s so important that you do your part to make sure my strategy to keep Kansas conservative is sound.
[**Will you take my Issues Survey now?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=811545b9d24e4bb4ac16c992c6a5fbd6&_e=SS4fFP3bLXnVQeL8amy4PqrpFS6TDIR5EegNKhXsW5TWXpMuz7HFv6ATA3ARp6qxCbtYXvOlYd4Y15IuTt8kBAFlK22VuPc3NrByaeOXXaDdsrHeb9SYwh1oEgETB3nMjM8Zs5vI1Ra8zM3VEg7sm0rl6rWHKKDdPh_rkcRA2dDJSItxKLWolVCx4qkckQ3rKnpz1JNOuqMWkMANEbKXTUmMwB_L3xuyFfClrbNbMT00T0QGBeRrRJZqOrpH_ZUc0EH3OWDD87WVAusWP6SJzT-fDyJzH7jmB-4s9Cm4d-ccr1IzGyJdhOkV-AsqGG4uxT3xdDc8GatZe0d_5GqkKtzVTIyIpnB2iZfIqI_I2ifw2L_tegZby-rxkJDH4Pprn8qH-0iJr3jRidz4CyMkMQ%3D%3D)
Dave Lindstrom
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Kansas

Paid for by Lindstrom for Senate

name: Tim Kaine
subject: New Hampshire has even more power than you know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

New Hampshire gets a lot of attention in the lead-up to the presidential election -- and rightfully so, because Granite Staters have a critical role to play. But there's another election in New Hampshire that's just as important: Jeanne Shaheen is up for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and we've got to make sure she wins. From protecting and expanding affordable health care to taking meaningful action to address the scourge of gun violence in our communities, we can finally make progress if we have a Democratic Senate. **That 's why I'm asking you, Derek, can you chip in $10 or more to make sure Jeanne Shaheen has the resources she needs to win in 2020?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $10**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176a/3e0906/78f98fd4/3e30f950/1332301942/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-js?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190924_2_FR_TK_JS_10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=20190924_2_FR_TK_JS&source=20190924_2_FR_TK_JS")

I don't need to tell you that New Hampshire was _extremely_ close in 2016, when Senator Hassan won by just 1,017 votes. And Republicans remember, too -- they're making New Hampshire a top target in 2020, and the money has already begun to pour in from special interests and Republican donors across the country.
Jeanne won't be relying on outside money -- she'll be relying on you, because you know what a Republican victory in New Hampshire would mean for our future.
**So please, chip in whatever you can today and help send my friend and colleague Jeanne Shaheen back to the U.S. Senate.**
******[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176a/3e0906/78f98fd4/3e30f954/1332301942/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-js?express_lane=true&refcode=20190924_2_FR_TK_JS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190924_2_FR_TK_JS&source=20190924_2_FR_TK_JS")******

Thank you for all you're doing,
-Tim Kaine

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: keeping the House blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Friends,

As I hope you have heard, a few months ago I announced that I am running for re-election – and right now, I am taking all of the necessary steps to prepare for that race. And a significant part of that preparation is raising the funds that I need to run a real grassroots campaign that takes my message directly to the voters and win again.

If that challenge does not materialize, then the bulk of my campaign funds – as I have always done – will go to support our Democratic House candidates here in California and around the country and to protect (and maybe even expand) our Democratic House Majority next year. Last cycle alone, I contributed over $1.8m directly from my campaign account as part of the effort to flip the House and I also financed buses, lunches, and hotel rooms for volunteers from my district to knock on doors and get out the vote in our Central Valley districts and to fund other GOTV efforts in the five Republican-held seats in Southern California that we flipped. And I hope to continue helping in such a big way next year as we work to protect our California 7 and other hard-won seats we picked up last year.

Your help once more would certainly go a long way to that goal. If you can help, you can give at this personalized link and I'll get updates in real time.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl2020-september?refcode=ZL2020_EM_FR_WL_190924_1_1&amount=35&recurring=auto [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl2020-september?refcode=ZL2020_EM_FR_WL_190924_1_1&amount=35&recurring=auto]

Anything you can do at this time would really mean a great deal to me.

I know you get asked to support many worthwhile causes and candidates -- and I am very grateful for your consideration of this request to help me again and for the encouragement you have given me over the years.

Zoe

Sent from my iPad

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]
Contributions or gifts to Zoe Lofgren for Congress are not tax deductible.Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Our prisons are overcrowded and broken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The U.S. jails more of its citizens than any other nation on Earth \-- our prison population has skyrocketed for decades due to racist laws and policing that have destroyed countless communities. Our system values private prison profits for executives over reform and rehabilitation for inmates. We could be addressing addiction and lowering recidivism rates, but instead we're warehousing people as corporations wring every dollar possible out of them and their families. We need a massive reform of our prison systems at every level \-- federal, state, and local \-- so that we can rebuild these communities and move this country forward. No more private prisons, no more mandatory minimum sentencing, and no more biased drug laws that punish people of color more harshly for similar crimes. [**Today, we 're asking you to stand with us and help us reform our prison system -- it is broken and hurting America, and we must do something about it.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd35/6e9863e8/14e30bd1/1db0d587/2404665872/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/end-mass-incarceration/wdtop/") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd35/6e9863e8/14e30bd1/1db0d587/2404665872/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/end-mass-incarceration/wdtop/")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | | Team: Michael has held more events in Iowa this September than any other candidate because he's going all-in, but we need your help today to keep this grassroots movement growing!

[**Will you chip in right now to help us strike while the iron is hot?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team Bennet had a big weekend in Iowa!

We spent all day Saturday at a major Iowa political institution: the Polk County Steak Fry! Check out the energy on the ground:

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Michael marched into the Steak Fry surrounded by supporters carrying a 10-foot gavel so we could remind caucusgoers in Iowa that the Des Moines Register said he was pounding truth into the campaign.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Michael helped the Polk County Dems grill a few steaks and pour beers -- "Technique honed in Colorado. Results delivered for Iowa Democrats."

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Throughout the day, Michael spent hours talking with caucusgoers about next year's election.

Then, during his speech, Michael outlined a three-part strategy not only to win the nomination and defeat Donald Trump, but to actually accomplish meaningful change.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
[**If you believe in Michael 's mission to create opportunity for every American and restore integrity to our government, we need your support!**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Donate any amount today to ensure every undecided voter hears Michael 's message and helps us keep sharing his vision, voter by voter, state by state. Will you step up?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf74/134673f2/ab30f97/69961832/2541411725/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowa-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: "The race for the Senate is almost as vital as the White House."
body:
We have to win in Maine.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c47/4bef7a87/689df06b/287f3031/1115759491/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**" The race for the Senate is almost as vital as the White House."**
**-_The Guardian_**
[**Chip in before our 9/30 FEC deadline and help us flip the Senate -> **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c47/4bef7a87/689df06b/287f3030/1115759491/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190924-full")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c47/4bef7a87/689df06b/287f3030/1115759491/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190924-full")**
Friend,
**Flipping the Senate in 2020 couldn 't be more important. **
With Mitch McConnell steering the ship, it will be impossible for any Democratic president to make progress on the issues we all care about.
But Democrats don't stand a chance of taking the Senate unless we win right here in Maine. **Ours is the single most flippable Senate seat this cycle, so we have to pull this out.**
[**Rush a $3 contribution before our FEC deadline on September 30th. We 're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation is even more important. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c47/4bef7a87/689df06b/287f3030/1115759491/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190924-full")
The good news is, Susan Collins is more vulnerable than ever. Her approval rating has fallen _44 points_ since 2017. We have a real opportunity here to take this seat.
Let's not waste it,
Team Sara
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c47/4bef7a87/689df06b/287f3030/1115759491/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190924-full")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c47/4bef7a87/689df06b/287f3037/1115759491/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c47/4bef7a87/689df06b/287f3036/1115759491/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Protect the Seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
There's no room for another Nancy Pelosi liberal in Washington. The 2nd Congressional seat is vulnerable, and we must fight to protect it. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/49d136de1758/protect-the-seat?e=1050d051da)
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | | |
---
Patriot,

| | | | | | **"One of the major priorities of any Republican Congressman is to make sure that Nancy Pelosi loses the speaker’s gavel, and part of that is making sure you are doing all the work it takes to keep the seat in Republican hands. The second district is in real jeopardy if we don’t have a different nominee."**

This is from a radio interview I did last week discussing my reasons for choosing to run for Congress. (You can listen to the full interview [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e7cdd058f6&e=1050d051da).)

[Will you chip in to help make sure that we don't lose another seat to a Democrat in Kansas?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=292de2951c&e=1050d051da)

Choosing to become a candidate for Congress was a huge decision that my wife, Suzanne, and I made together with prayer. We know it is the right thing to do.

And here's why...

We have a President in office who needs a steadfast team of conservative fighters continually pushing back with him against the liberals threatening to tear apart our nation. We can't afford to lose any ground to Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi and her fellow Democrats. We have already given up one seat in Kansas to the Democrats, and it would be devastating to lose another.

The 2nd District Congressional seat is vulnerable, and I have decided to step up and offer Kansans a solid conservative choice in the 2nd District. I was born and raised in Southeast Kansas and I have what it takes to hang on to that seat for the Republican party. I will go to Washington with the determination and grit of a true conservative fighter and stand up for our values just as I have as State Treasurer and during my two terms in the Kansas state senate.

Help us ensure that Kansas does not lose another seat to the Democrats in the House. Show your support today with a [donation of $500, $100, $50, or even $25.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=eebbb6f239&e=1050d051da)

Together we will show the Democrats the door, and secure our country's future for our children and grandchildren.

Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner
Conservative for U.S. Congress

---
| [Donate Now](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=428549163f&e=1050d051da "Donate Now")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
| | |
---

subject: In case you missed Greg's email...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**We just wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you saw Greg 's email below about Saturday's deadline fundraiser at the Farm at South Mountain in Phoenix.**

[**If you have not yet done so, please RSVP to let us know ASAP if you 're planning to attend**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/BaqA_l-hqwIl7glmvdxoDCnH7oThEM_r3zXkrfriBYo=) -- we are expecting to sell out of tickets to this fundraiser very soon!

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/l741OgbXEwAgovMzNALPHQa0Z2RLsWuBDqV6S-cwEiE=)
Thanks for your support and we hope to see you Saturday,

\-- _Stanton for Arizona _
* * *
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Greg Stanton** <info@stantonforarizona.com>
Date: Sun, Sep 22, 2019 at 9:33 AM
Subject: Will you join me on Saturday?
To: <info@stantonforarizona.com>

**On Saturday, our team is hosting a final deadline fundraiser at one of Phoenix 's preeminent venues, The Farm at South Mountain, and I hope you can join us!**

The full details for the event, which will take place from 5:30-7:30pm on Saturday, are on the invite below.

We need to have an accurate count of who all to expect, so please [**RSVP**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/l741OgbXEwAgovMzNALPHQa0Z2RLsWuBDqV6S-cwEiE=) if you plan to attend, or consider [**DONATING**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/QplnC_BK8QV-JIAScadRS2X4ILZhqm9cW-nYgnUMar4=?refcode=X_092219_Invite_SouthMountain_B) if you cannot make it, but want to show your support.

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/l741OgbXEwAgovMzNALPHQa0Z2RLsWuBDqV6S-cwEiE=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/QplnC_BK8QV-JIAScadRS2X4ILZhqm9cW-nYgnUMar4=?refcode=X_092219_Invite_SouthMountain_B)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/l741OgbXEwAgovMzNALPHQa0Z2RLsWuBDqV6S-cwEiE=)

This event will be critical to helping my campaign reach our end of quarter fundraising goal and I am expecting dozens of fellow supporters to be there as well.

[**If you 're interested in joining for this impactful event, please RSVP now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/BaqA_l-hqwIl7glmvdxoDCnH7oThEM_r3zXkrfriBYo=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFDgIVhF9hB8rB7eR-9trm9Klj1_u1WQWCpEdimsOSg=/l741OgbXEwAgovMzNALPHQa0Z2RLsWuBDqV6S-cwEiE=)

I hope to see you Saturday,

\-- _Greg Stanton_

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team -- A Democratic president can only be so successful without a Senate majority. That's why, as presidential campaigns scale up ahead of the end-of-quarter deadline, we need to keep pace.
Our fundraising is a bit behind for the month and we haven't quite hit the $4,374 we need to raise today to get back on track. **Time is running out to catch up and with a Democrat vulnerable like Senator Hassan, missing a single deadline could lose us her reelection.**
[**Democrats can 't win back a Senate majority without Maggie, so will you please give $3 or whatever you can right now to stop Republicans from taking back this vulnerable seat? Anything you can give makes a huge difference.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc395/2a380d31/3d99651c/f0d8a7/3335852750/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkyNF8xZGF5Ml82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190924_1day2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

body:
Here are the highlights ->
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa22d/18d6a294/4cfe4539/26d64b45/2007854568/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | | | FEC DEADLINE: 6 DAYS AWAY
RUSH IN A CONTRIBUTION | | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa22d/18d6a294/4cfe4539/26d64b42/2007854568/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjRuZCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190924nd?refcode=jme190924nd_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Wow -- this has been a HUGE quarter for our campaign. Here are some highlights:
**JULY**
* Gov. Haslam said he wouldn't enter the race, making this **a real pick-up opportunity for James.**
* **Trump launched Republican opponent Bill Hagerty's campaign in a tweet **nearly two months before he'd even announce!

[](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa22d/18d6a294/4cfe4539/26d64b42/2007854568/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjRuZCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190924nd?refcode=jme190924nd_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
**AUGUST**
* _The Tennessean_ ran an awesome op-ed **calling James "the candidate our state needs."**
* Emmylou Harris performed at a benefit concert for James, telling a packed crowd that change would only come if **we all work together to win this race.**

**SEPTEMBER**
* **Hagerty FINALLY announced his campaign** himself with the support of Washington special interests.
* **The national veterans organization VOTEVETS endorsed James** , calling him a "tremendous pick for senator."
* **The next big FEC deadline is less than a week away** on September 30th!

This race is really ramping up, and we can't afford to slow down now.
[**Help keep our momentum going by making sure we hit our FEC goal in six days. Chip in now ->**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa22d/18d6a294/4cfe4539/26d64b43/2007854568/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjRuZCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190924nd?refcode=jme190924nd_m&recurring=true")

name: Hunt for Congress
subject: Lizzie Fletcher Supports Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Today, Lizzie Fletcher sided with her party over the will of her constituents
in the 7th Congressional District. Instead of working in the spirit of
Today, Lizzie Fletcher sided with her party over the will of her constituents
in the 7th Congressional District. Instead of working in the spirit of
bipartisanship to help improve the lives of voters, Fletcher decided to support
the endless efforts to impeach the President.

After years of trying to remove President Trump from office, House Democrats
were stopped cold when the Mueller investigation showed no evidence of
collusion with Russia. Instead of accepting the report and moving onto the
business of the American people, Pelosi and House Democrats chose to continue
searching for a reason to impeach the duly elected President.

This week, Congresswoman Fletcher decided to join them. Fletcher caved to the
radical calls for impeachment by stating, “The House should act swiftly to
investigate and should be prepared to use the remedy exclusively in its power:
impeachment.”

In response to this statement, Republican Candidate for Congress Wesley Hunt
released the following:

“By announcing her support for impeachment, Lizzie Fletcher betrayed the
voters of the 7th Congressional District, who sent her to Washington as a
moderate working to create solutions. This district needs a Representative who
will work to secure the border, lower taxes and keep Houston’s economy strong.
The voters deserve a Representative who will stand up for our values, not
someone who caves to the extremists in their political Party.”

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=0ffcb3897d3e44b69256cedc30612c24&_t=0p925szqX7srnCpOuyG5JawnRnT0ujViREYZiddJTLCxwas8xVuo8b_r41k_ST0tmVk7ey3n4S1gEKcp2Zztj4MdPxLu7LTjH-agD2b9yL0CEUvdsUS0a5bKS1q1jJbU0Vo0WAmp07xa1gFAM7B5yGzQ5pAwmpifABY5-PmgJvw%3D>
.

name: Team Weld
subject: WATCH: Bill debate tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
**Watch Bill Debate:
** Tonight at 7:00 PM

| | Nancy Pelosi just wrapped up a news conference where she announced the House is opening a formal impeachment inquiry of Trump. This announcement comes after a dozen Democrats announced their support following the latest revelations concerning Trump's withholding of military aid and subsequent phone conversation with the Ukranian president. What follows will undoubtedly be a partisan political slugfest. We're interested in seeing what voters think right now: **Should Donald Trump be impeached?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd37/6e9863e8/151c99a9/1db0d46b/1071296411/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Qd8u_0pX") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd37/6e9863e8/151c99a9/1db0d46b/1071296411/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Qd8u_0pX") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd37/6e9863e8/151c99a9/1db0d469/1071296411/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190924c.ND-b&refcode2=CZNP3LVXIqnKexZuDPla")

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[Add your name: It's time to begin an impeachment inquiry of President Trump.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c03/42ab3cf4/61e1025f/135d7b8c/583375027/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190924&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
Today, I am calling on the House of Representatives to begin a formal impeachment inquiry of President Donald Trump.
President Trump himself admitted that, while on a phone call with the President of Ukraine, he sought damaging information about his possible future opponent, former Vice President Joe Biden, while at the same time he was withholding $250 million worth of U.S. military aid for Ukraine as a bargaining chip.
By any reasonable standard, these actions are out of step with our laws and our values, and I believe they warrant an impeachment inquiry.
**[Join me and take a stand for our democracy. Add your name to support the opening of an impeachment inquiry of President Trump now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c03/42ab3cf4/61e1025f/135d7b8c/583375027/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190924&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
The Trump Administration has repeatedly refused to comply with Congressional subpoenas, meaning the only way we can truly move forward with this critically important investigation is by opening an impeachment inquiry.
Because of these and other disturbing developments, I believe that it's now up to Congress to act under our constitutional authority and begin an impeachment inquiry because the American people deserve answers about President Trump's abuse of power and potentially illegal actions.
I didn't come to this decision lightly--but defending our democracy and our nation's values against this reckless President's actions has never been more essential than it is now.
**[Sign on now to stand with me as I call for an impeachment inquiry of President Trump.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c03/42ab3cf4/61e1025f/135d7b8c/583375027/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190924&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c03/42ab3cf4/61e1025f/135d7b8c/583375027/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190924&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *

Reporters, pundits, and the Republican operatives will use these numbers to judge the strength of this campaign.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Time to start impeachment proceedings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Moments ago, Speaker Pelosi announced her plans to launch a formal impeachment inquiry of President Trump. **The Speaker said, "The President must be held accountable" and I couldn't agree more that this is the right path forward.** I, like millions of Americans, have been deeply troubled by what we've learned this past week about Donald Trump and his phone call with the Ukrainian president. And this is just the latest example of conduct by Trump deserving of an impeachment inquiry. **The moral vandalism we 're witnessing in the Oval Office poses a challenge to all Americans: this goes far beyond partisan divides and is part of a greater call to action to put the best interests of the American people before allegiance to political party.** Let me be clear: the President of the United States cannot seek the help of a foreign government for the purposes of attacking a political rival. The Trump administration is stonewalling Congress by refusing to release the whistleblower complaint that brought these concerns to light. **[Team, if you agree with myself and Speaker Pelosi that it's time to start the impeachment process, add your name next to ours.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_pet_20190924_CB_20190924-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is not the first time I've called to initiate impeachment proceedings of the president. We have a president who _repeatedly_ disregards the rule of law and misuses the powers of his office. **He must be held accountable for his actions. And this is our one remaining path to ensuring that justice is served.** As members of Congress, it's on each of us to fulfill our responsibility to protect and defend the Constitution. This is one of those moments in history where we must step up and meet that obligation. **[Add your name if you agree with Speaker Pelosi's decision to start impeachment proceedings.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_pet_20190924_CB_20190924-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Justice must prevail. Cory **[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_pet_20190924_CB_20190924-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

clean_body: | | | | Team, Moments ago, Speaker Pelosi announced her plans to launch a formal impeachment inquiry of President Trump. The Speaker said, "The President must be held accountable" and I couldn't agree more that this is the right path forward. I, like millions of Americans, have been deeply troubled by what we've learned this past week about Donald Trump and his phone call with the Ukrainian president. And this is just the latest example of conduct by Trump deserving of an impeachment inquiry. The moral vandalism we 're witnessing in the Oval Office poses a challenge to all Americans: this goes far beyond partisan divides and is part of a greater call to action to put the best interests of the American people before allegiance to political party. Let me be clear: the President of the United States cannot seek the help of a foreign government for the purposes of attacking a political rival. The Trump administration is stonewalling Congress by refusing to release the whistleblower complaint that brought these concerns to light. "=" This is not the first time I've called to initiate impeachment proceedings of the president. We have a president who repeatedly disregards the rule of law and misuses the powers of his office. He must be held accountable for his actions. And this is our one remaining path to ensuring that justice is served. As members of Congress, it's on each of us to fulfill our responsibility to protect and defend the Constitution. This is one of those moments in history where we must step up and meet that obligation. "=" Justice must prevail. Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Our future belongs to patriots, not to globalists
body:
President Donald J. Trump gave a major address to the U.N. General Assembly in New York today, charting a prosperous future for countries the... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=817ca9fdf4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 24, 2019
---
| | |
# **Our future belongs to patriots, not to globalists**

**President Donald J. Trump** gave a major address to the U.N. General Assembly in New York today, charting a prosperous future for countries the world over—one built on the empowerment of citizens and respect for national sovereignty.

**President Trump:** [“If you want freedom, take pride in your country.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7772a1db5f&e=3ee4985eea)

**“The future** does not belong to globalists—the future belongs to patriots. The future belongs to sovereign and independent nations who protect their citizens, respect their neighbors, and honor the differences that make each country special and unique,” the President said.

**America today** is a prime example of the success that can be had when a country starts focusing on the good of its own people. Before President Trump took office, many leaders around the world, including our own, spent the bulk of their time and energy catering to the opinions of fellow global elites. Lost in the shuffle of this popularity contest were the interests of the working class that built this country. Jobs were outsourced, and a shrinking handful of insiders became wealthier at the expense of everyone else.

**“Globalism** exerted a religious pull over past leaders, causing them to ignore their own national interests,” President Trump said.

**It’s a different story now,** as America has witnessed an economic revival centered around pro-growth, pro-worker policies such as historic tax cuts, deregulation, and trade reform. President Trump reminded world leaders today that the results of this agenda are paying off for those previously left behind. “Wages are rising. Incomes are soaring. And 2.5 million Americans have been lifted out of poverty in less than 3 years,” he said.

**Throughout today’s speech,** he made the case for applying similar approaches to the most pressing issues of our time. All of these ideas have one important thing in common: They put the interests of American people first.

* _**Fighting unfair trade:**_ Old trade deals that outsourced our jobs are being thrown out, replaced by fair ones—such as the NAFTA-revamping USMCA—that give our workers a level playing field.

* **_Protecting individual freedoms:_** America is leading the way in promoting liberty as a human rights issue throughout the world, including championing the economic role of women in our societies.

* **_Shutting down dangerous open-border advocates:_** Unprecedented action is being taken to stop illegal immigration and put an end to human smuggling once and for all.

* **_Holding Iran accountable:_** President Trump called on fellow world leaders to join America in standing up to Iran, the world’s number one state sponsor of terrorism.

* **_Promoting a free Western Hemisphere:_** America stands with the people of Venezuela, and the events taking place there should remind everyone that socialism ultimately leads to poverty and authoritarianism.

**Building a better future** starts at home. It’s a simple message that President Trump has encouraged his fellow world leaders to embrace from the beginning. If the American blueprint is followed—putting citizens before the ruling class and standing up for democratic sovereignty without hesitation—then real prosperity is never far behind.

[Must watch: President Trump addresses the 74th Session of the U.N. General Assembly](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a68e441f9&e=3ee4985eea)

** Yesterday at the U.N.: **[The President issues global call to protect religious freedom](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd0e83b8aa&e=3ee4985eea)
---

clean_body: President Donald J. Trump gave a major address to the U.N. General Assembly in New York today, charting a prosperous future for countries the... | | | | | The White House • September 24, 2019 | | | Our future belongs to patriots, not to globalists President Donald J. Trump gave a major address to the U.N. General Assembly in New York today, charting a prosperous future for countries the world over—one built on the empowerment of citizens and respect for national sovereignty. President Trump: “The future does not belong to globalists—the future belongs to patriots. The future belongs to sovereign and independent nations who protect their citizens, respect their neighbors, and honor the differences that make each country special and unique,” the President said. America today is a prime example of the success that can be had when a country starts focusing on the good of its own people. Before President Trump took office, many leaders around the world, including our own, spent the bulk of their time and energy catering to the opinions of fellow global elites. Lost in the shuffle of this popularity contest were the interests of the working class that built this country. Jobs were outsourced, and a shrinking handful of insiders became wealthier at the expense of everyone else. “Globalism exerted a religious pull over past leaders, causing them to ignore their own national interests,” President Trump said. It’s a different story now, as America has witnessed an economic revival centered around pro-growth, pro-worker policies such as historic tax cuts, deregulation, and trade reform. President Trump reminded world leaders today that the results of this agenda are paying off for those previously left behind. “Wages are rising. Incomes are soaring. And 2.5 million Americans have been lifted out of poverty in less than 3 years,” he said. Throughout today’s speech, he made the case for applying similar approaches to the most pressing issues of our time. All of these ideas have one important thing in common: They put the interests of American people first. Fighting unfair trade: Old trade deals that outsourced our jobs are being thrown out, replaced by fair ones—such as the NAFTA-revamping USMCA—that give our workers a level playing field. Protecting individual freedoms: America is leading the way in promoting liberty as a human rights issue throughout the world, including championing the economic role of women in our societies. Shutting down dangerous open-border advocates: Unprecedented action is being taken to stop illegal immigration and put an end to human smuggling once and for all. Holding Iran accountable: President Trump called on fellow world leaders to join America in standing up to Iran, the world’s number one state sponsor of terrorism. Promoting a free Western Hemisphere: America stands with the people of Venezuela, and the events taking place there should remind everyone that socialism ultimately leads to poverty and authoritarianism. Building a better future starts at home. It’s a simple message that President Trump has encouraged his fellow world leaders to embrace from the beginning. If the American blueprint is followed—putting citizens before the ruling class and standing up for democratic sovereignty without hesitation—then real prosperity is never far behind. Yesterday at the U.N.: | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian | President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks at the 74th session of the United Nations General Assembly at the United Nations Headquarters in New York | September 24, 2019 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 USA · 202-456-1111

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

I am grateful to Speaker Pelosi for opening an impeachment inquiry into
President Trump.

For more than two years, even as I was running for Senate in Texas, I have
been clear that I support impeachment. We all must come to terms with what
we face: a lawless president who has obstructed justice and undermined our
democracy by inviting a foreign power to intervene in 2016, and who is
doing it again in 2020.

This is a defining moment for our country. I believe our nation will rise
to it—but only if we stop worrying about polls and start doing what’s
right. Many are concerned that impeachment will further tear this country
apart. I believe the opposite—that this process can be what finally begins
to unite this nation once again. Because before we are anything else, we
are all Americans first. And if we believe no one is above the law, if we
believe our democracy is worth defending—from enemies foreign and
domestic—then we must impeach President Trump.

At this defining moment, history is calling on us to do the right thing,
and it is on each and every one of us to save this democracy before it’s
too late.

Sincerely,

Beto

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d28b/6cd27893/518bff7b/15872c48/1376111490/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Today is a day that will be talked about for generations; that will be written about in history books. Why? Because my Democratic colleagues in the House are moving forward with a formal impeachment inquiry of the President. **It's about time. I****strongly****support this impeachment inquiry because when there is substantial evidence that the president has broken the law and corrupted our foreign policy for personal gain, he must be held accountable.** To say that Donald Trump's presidency has been a disaster and a disgrace puts it too lightly. By all accounts, he and his political operatives may very well have committed several crimes against our country. The House will do its constitutional duty, to investigate and shine a light on all the potential high crimes and misdemeanors that Donald Trump and members of his administration may have committed. **... and, if after this process the House decides to impeach Donald Trump, the Senate**** _must_****do its constitutional duty and take up the case. No obstruction. No punting. No sneaky tricks to avoid responsibility.** I'm going to be watching this process closely. I know you will, too. The future of our country is at stake. **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d28b/6cd27893/518bff7b/15872c49/1376111490/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-09-24-impeach&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d28b/6cd27893/518bff7b/15872c46/1376111490/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-09-24-impeach&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d28b/6cd27893/518bff7b/15872c47/1376111490/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-09-24-impeach&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d28b/6cd27893/518bff7b/15872c44/1376111490/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-09-24-impeach&refcode2=express-buttons")

| Indiana Republicans -

"Presidential Harassment."

**President Donald Trump said it best this afternoon, after Nancy Pelosi and her liberal friends in the U.S. House of Representatives have decided to use taxpayer resources to launch a formal impeachment inquiry against President Donald Trump.**

Nancy Pelosi and her socialist-leaning Democrat allies have noticed the positive trajectory of our country – more than 6.3 million new jobs, unemployment at historic lows, strong wage growth and lower taxes – and they need a distraction.
[\--> Donate Now -- Stand with President Donald Trump <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bda8573fbf&e=1acd9bb3d6)
And so, in President Trump’s own words, they’ve launched their own “witch hunt”...and it’s nothing other than “presidential harassment.”

**Here at the Indiana Republican Party, we won’t stand for it!**

We’re fighting everyday to tell Hoosiers about President Trump’s positive record of results, and to make sure that Indiana is the FIRST state on the board for President Trump and Vice President Pence in 2020.

But we can’t fight Pelosi and the Democrats without your help!

[Would you be willing to chip in $5, $10, $25, or even $100 right now to stand with President Trump and to help us at the Indiana Republican Party fight to help him Keep America Great?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a7f917f9cd&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**We’re stronger with President Trump. We’re stronger together. And we’re stronger with your help.**

Thanks,
Your Indiana Republican Team

P.S. Because of your support, President Trump won Indiana by 19 percentage points in 2016. With Nancy Pelosi launching impeachment proceedings, we're going to need your help again to re-elect President Trump next year. [Would you consider donating NOW to help make that happen?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c0bb2e1a3f&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Jonathan
subject: We're not there yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We're not going to sugar coat it. We're under fire from all sides.
|
---

| | Peter, we're not going to sugar coat it. We're under fire from all sides. Outside groups are pouring money into Kentucky with fear-mongering ads designed to divide us. It's a whole lot of spending to be up against.

We're running a different kind of campaign -- based on getting out and talking to Kentuckians in their communities about the issues most important to them. And then we're planning to run the biggest ground game Kentucky has ever seen to make sure we Get Out The Vote on November 5th! **But that takes resources and right now we're $1,108 short of our GOTV Fund goal. Will you pitch in to help?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a56/ad6dc73/141be78c/db79513/3866532826/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-gotv?express_lane=true&refcode=20190924.2nd__284__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a56/ad6dc73/141be78c/db79510/3866532826/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-gotv?express_lane=true&refcode=20190924.2nd__284__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a56/ad6dc73/141be78c/db79511/3866532826/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-gotv?express_lane=true&refcode=20190924.2nd__284__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a56/ad6dc73/141be78c/db79516/3866532826/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-gotv?express_lane=true&refcode=20190924.2nd__284__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a56/ad6dc73/141be78c/db79517/3866532826/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-gotv?express_lane=true&refcode=20190924.2nd__284__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a56/ad6dc73/141be78c/db79514/3866532826/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-gotv?refcode=20190924.2nd__284__")** We're relying on grassroots donors like you to help counter the smears and attacks from the other side. name: Brandon Beach
subject: checking in
body:
Peter,

It's days like today that I am so thankful to my family and all those who have supported us over the years. We had a long day on the campaign trail hearing from our community and one thing is clear -- it's time for a change.

I'm running for Congress to bring new blood to Georgia's sixth district and deliver on the bold solutions I've run on. We have a long road ahead us to win this election. Every deadline is critical to ensure folks continue to hear our message. Can I count on your support before our end of quarter deadline?

Please consider taking 5 minutes and donating to our campaign today: www.beachforcongress.com/donate

Thanks,

Brandon

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you are no longer interested you can unsubscribe instantly:

clean_body: Peter, It's days like today that I am so thankful to my family and all those who have supported us over the years. We had a long day on the campaign trail hearing from our community and one thing is clear -- it's time for a change. I'm running for Congress to bring new blood to Georgia's sixth district and deliver on the bold solutions I've run on. We have a long road ahead us to win this election. Every deadline is critical to ensure folks continue to hear our message. Can I count on your support before our end of quarter deadline? Please consider taking 5 minutes and donating to our campaign today: www.beachforcongress.com/donate Thanks, Brandon
